center.name: Ingham, Queensland
center.summary: Ingham, Queensland是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Pied monarch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pied monarch is found in tropical forest edge habitats and secondary growth in coastal north eastern Queensland, from Cooktown to Ingham

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pied monarch is found in tropical forest edge habitats and secondary growth in coastal north eastern Queensland, from Cooktown to Ingham
